name: Preparing for workers comp hearing in Boise, what questions?

mainEntity.name: Preparing for workers comp hearing in Boise, what questions?

acceptedAnswer.text: Injury incident, job duties, medical history, symptoms; stay consistent.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Expect testimony on injury details, job, medicals, history, symptoms, limitations; be consistent.[3][6] Cross-exam on priors/inconsistencies.[6] Key factors: (1) Know lost work dates; (2) Witnesses if any; (3) Pictures/diagrams; (4) Truthful on pre-existing.[3][9] Review records, practice answers. Hearings decide disputes—prepare thoroughly.

description: Injury incident, job duties, medical history, symptoms; stay consistent.[3]
